infotexts.jobdescription.PlayerMudraptorJob: The return of Man's best friend.
infotexts.yamjMsg.cantUseItem: you don't know how to use that yet
infotexts.yamjMsg.cantRepair: you don't know how to repair that yet
infotexts.entitydescription.backpackYAMJ: A backpack for storing ammunition, suits, and children. Light and human-wearable.
infotexts.entitydescription.backpackYAMJbio: A large, luminescent backpack for storing ammunition, suits, and children. WARNING: Not made for Humans.
infotexts.entitydescription.backpackYAMJ2: A massive, heavy backpack for storing large items, containers, and children. Reduces movement speed by 25% while worn. WARNING: Not made for Humans.
infotexts.entitydescription.flareYAMJ: A bright sponge that glows when in contact with skin.
infotexts.entitydescription.raptorguitar: A dark blue guitar created by the one and only Guitar Raptor.
infotexts.entitydescription.raptorcowboyhat: Be rootin', be tootin', be shootin', but most importantly, launch nuclear shells at pirates.
infotexts.entitydescription.mudraptorequiphelmet: A strong helmet made to fit the mudraptor.
infotexts.entitydescription.mudraptorpiratehelmet: A strong pirate helmet made to fit the mudraptor.
infotexts.entitydescription.mudraptorequiparmor: Strong piece of armor for the mudraptor (don't equip as a human).
infotexts.entitydescription.mudraptorpiratearmor: Strong piece of pirate armor for the mudraptor (don't equip as a human).
infotexts.entitydescription.mudraptorveteranarmor: Strong piece of veteran armor for the mudraptor (don't equip as a human).
infotexts.entitydescription.mudraptorclownarmor: Strong piece of clown armor for the mudraptor (don't equip as a human).
infotexts.entitydescription.crowbarYAMJ: A special tool for removing armor from your friendly mudraptors.
infotexts.entitydescription.jumptalentitem: After injecting this, you gain the ability to jump by ragdolling. Very useful for mudraptors.
infotexts.entitydescription.mudraptorbook: A book with instructions on how to train your mudraptor pet to lay down, and be carried.
infotexts.entitydescription.mudraptorshield: A shield made of mudraptor shell, capable of stopping small arms fire.
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJCanUseTools: Learn to properly hold and use tools.
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJSpeechBasic: Gain the ability to speak, and learn a few basic words.
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJArmorDesc: Gain the ability to form a hard shell and an extra [amount]% reduction to damage
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJEgg: Gain the ability to foster mudraptor eggs, and the recipe for mudraptor shields to protect them.
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJFlareDesc: Gain the recipe for Bio Flares, sponges that glow very brightly when held. Gain one after every mission.
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJSleepTime: Ragdolling for [seconds] seconds grants the Sleepy Raptor bonus, healing damage over time but only while on land. Burn recovery rate is much slower than normal damage recovery during this effect.
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJBackpackDesc: Make mudraptor backpacks. Humans can wear it, but it looks a little silly. 5 slots for small/medium items and 1 slot for children. Can store suits and ammo boxes.
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJFlareIceDesc: An ice cold sponge that glows very brightly when held. It slows down any hostiles near you while held. You generate one whenever a mission is completed. The effect of the flare does not harm yourself or humans.
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJFlareFireDesc: A flaming red hot sponge that glows very brightly when held. It slowly burns any hostiles near you while held. You generate one whenever a mission is completed. The effect of the flare does not harm yourself or humans.
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJBestFriendDesc: Humans within a fair range of you can always rely on you to catch them when they fall. They gain +[walkspeed]% Walk/Run Speed, +[swimspeed]% Swim Speed, +[waterflowresist]% Water Flow Resistance (Including Yourself).
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJSleepTime2: Naps become stronger. Humans now also gain the [affliction] bonus if they're near you while you nap. They also gain +[bookpower]% of the Skill points from books they read while under this effect as well.
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJSpeechCombat: Learn to properly hold and use weapons, and gain violent new vocabulary.
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJArmorPirateDesc: Learn new ways to protect yourself. Gain an additional [amount]% reduction to damage.
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJBackpack2Desc: Make heavy-duty mudraptor backpacks capable of storing larger items and containers. 9 slots for items, 2 for containers, 1 for children. Slows movement when equipped. Humans should definitely not wear this.
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJHeatSignature: Your time near humans and on land has given you a better understanding of how body heat functions. Gain [amount]% burn and poison resistance.
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJGunner: Gain a [amount]% power increase to submarine turrets.
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJHumanoid: Gain a [amount]% power increase to melee weapons and firearms.
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJBond_SecurityDesc: Trained by Security to be the best Guard Dog this side of europa. Not attacking for 10 seconds grants you the Raptor Bite bonus, increasing your Creature Attack by 150% for one attack. While near others they gain 35% Stun Resistance. +10% Turret Attack Speed and Charge Speed. -10% Turret Power Cost. +10% Attack Speed. -20% Ranged Weapon Spread.
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJBond_DoctorDesc: Your interest in the crew Doctor has led you to some interesting discoveries. You gain the Gene Harvester Talent. While near others they heal most Physical Damage very slowly while also gaining +20% Stun, Poison and Chem Addiction Resistance. +30 Medical Skill Bonus. +30% Medical Item Effectiveness.
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJArmorVetDesc: Gain the ability to form a hard carapace and helmet capable of withstanding the toughest of blows. Gain an additional [amount]% reduction to damage.
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJBloodthirsty: The scent of your own blood only fuels your frenzy.
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJFamiliarWaters: It's all coming back to you. While submerged in water, you gain the following:
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJMonsterInstinctDes: The old ways of combat are strong in your mind. Gain a [amount]% power increase to your creature attacks. It's only natural, after all.
infotexts.talentdescription.cannotfallunconsciousf: Your eyes glare with a burning passion for blood. Gain +[speed]% Speed and +[health]% Max Health.
Whenever you fall below 0 health, you will remain fully conscious for [duration] seconds and your attacks receive +300% power.
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJBond_CaptainDesc: Well, aren't you just the best raptor on any sub out there! Your fame knows no bounds. Whenever your crew completes a mission, everyone gains +10% Extra EXP and Marks. While near others they gain 15% Stun and Damage Resistance. +30 Helm Skill Bonus. +10% Attack Power.
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJBackpackBioDesc: Make mudraptor backpacks lined with glowing chemicals. 7 slots for items, 2 for children. Humans can't wear this without extreme pain.
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJGuitarRaptorDesc: Anyone hearing your music will be invigorated with the desire to do more, gaining a +10 bonus to All Skills. If you keep playing, people around you will gain 10 XP at random.
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJGuardianAngel: Enemies will prioritize attacking you over your allies, and you take [amount]% less damage.
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJClownCollege: The Honkmother's reach goes far in these deep dark waters...
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJMachinist: All crewmembers besides yourself can craft items at [amount] higher quality.
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJPostgradLimits: You may only install a maximum of 1 portable pump and 1 makeshift shelf.
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJBond_EngineerDesc: Hanging out with the Engineer has taught you a few things, alongside maybe a little bit too much radiation intake. You gain the Electrochemist Talent with a bonus 35 Radiation Sickness applied when it activates. +30 Electrical Skill Bonus. 25% Repair Speed.
infotexts.talentdescription.YAMJBond_MechanicDesc: You've picked up some tricks on how to better seek out what a mechanic requires. You gain the Scrounger Talent. +30 Mechanical Skill Bonus. +25% Hull/Mechanical Repair Speed and +50% Mining Speed.
infotexts.afflictiondescription.yamjHunger.low: A gnawing pain resides in the stomach.
infotexts.afflictiondescription.yamjHunger.medium: Focus is faltering, subject is drooling.
infotexts.afflictiondescription.yamjHunger.high: Sluggish and weak, showing clear signs of malnutrition.
infotexts.afflictiondescription.yamjHunger.veryHig: Experiencing severe malnutrition. A frantic surge of energy burns through what remains as the body begins to fail.
infotexts.afflictiondescription.yamjHunger.self.ve: Need food NOW! Find! Kill! Eat!
infotexts.afflictiondescription.YAMJGuardianAngelB: Your bleeding heart drives you to defend your allies to the last breath.
infotexts.afflictiondescription.YAMJBestFriendBuff: The Mudraptor close to you is bolstering your actions. +20% Walk/Run Speed. +40% Swim Speed. +75% Water Flow Resistance.
infotexts.afflictiondescription.YAMJSleepTimeIcon: While under the effects of Raptor Nap, your vitality is slowly regenerating. Reading a Book near the snoozing raptor is bound to be really relaxing.
infotexts.afflictiondescription.YAMJguitarraptorbu: Guitar Raptor's songs invigorate you with a passion to do more.
infotexts.afflictiondescription.YAMJFamiliarWaterB: You know exactly what you're doing and where you are.
infotexts.afflictiondescription.YAMJBond_CaptainBu: Bolstered by the effects of the best raptor around.
infotexts.afflictiondescription.YAMJBond_SecurityB: Your skill with weapons and turrets is bolstered due to the Guard Dog.
infotexts.afflictiondescription.YAMJRaptorBite: Fully charged and ready to nibble!
infotexts.afflictiondescription.YAMJBond_EngineerB: Your skill with electronics and repairing is bolstered due to the Radiation Rascal.
infotexts.afflictiondescription.YAMJBond_MechanicB: Your skills with mechanical devices and hull repairs are bolstered due to the Tool Seeker.
infotexts.afflictiondescription.YAMJBond_DoctorBuf: Your skills with medicines and poisons are bolstered due to the Doctor's Raptor.
